# `gds-aidr-infrastructure` Bug Report Template

<!--date_created:mon-18-may-2026-->
<!--date_updated:mon-18-may-2026-->


**Description**
Copy this document to report an error or bug.
Please use the boxes below to provide as much information required to help the engineer understand the issue(s) you are having :)

**Example**
```
name: Bug report for `gds-aidr-infrastructure`
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
environment: [dev]/[uat]/[prod] (which env are you referring to)
title: "[BUG:<DESCRIPTION>]"
labels: *[ADD LABELS]*
assignees: @your-github-username (IF RELEVANT)
name: firstname-surname
email: your-contact-email-address
```

---

## How to use the report

<details>
<summary><b>1. Describe the bug</b></summary>

```
*[A clear description of what is broken and what you expected to happen instead.]*


```

</details>

<details>
<summary><b>2. Steps to reproduce</b></summary>

```python
ADD CODE EXAMPLES


```
```*[Describe the steps you took, briefly]*
> 1. Step one
> 2. Step two
> 3. See error


```
</details>

<details>
<summary><b>3. Expected behaviour</b></summary>

```
*[What you expected to happen/or what you were trying to achieve]*


```
</details>

<details>
<summary><b>4. Actual behaviour</b></summary>


```
*[What *actually* happened. Include the full error message and stack trace if there is one.]*

```
</details>

<details>
<summary><b>5. Full traceback</B></summary>

```
*[Paste the full traceback here]*


```

</details>


<details>
<summary><b>6. Environment</b></summary>



```
*[PASTE YOUR ENVIRONMENT CONFIG HERE, IE .ENV FILE]*
(remember to remove any API keys or passwords if you so)


```

</details>



<details>
<summary><b>7. Additional context</b></summary>

```
*[ANY OTHER INFORMATION THAT MIGHT HELP - SCREENSHOTS, LINKS, RELATED ISSUES]*


```
</details>

## Submissions

> Bug reports will be added to a list of known issues and prioritised according to urgency
